languages.text: "Слышите! Мы — часть династии фон Валанциус! Мы больше не безродные гвардейцы, мы — щит Вольного Торговца!"
"Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"
languages.original_text: "Слышите! Мы — часть династии фон Валанциус! Мы больше не безродные гвардейцы, мы — щит Вольного Торговца!"

traits.locale_text: "Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"
"Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"
"Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"
"Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"
"Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"

languages.text: “听我说！我们是冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的一部分！我们不再是无名的卫兵——如今，我们是行商浪人的盾牌！”
languages.original_text: "Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"

traits.locale_text: “听我说！我们是冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的一部分！我们不再是无名的卫兵——如今，我们是行商浪人的盾牌！”

languages.text: "Dinleyin beni! Biz von Valancius hanedanlığının bir parçasıyız! Artık isimsiz Muhafızlar değiliz. Biz artık Hür Tacir'in kalkanıyız!"
languages.original_text: "Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"

traits.locale_text: "Dinleyin beni! Biz von Valancius hanedanlığının bir parçasıyız! Artık isimsiz Muhafızlar değiliz. Biz artık Hür Tacir'in kalkanıyız!"

languages.text: « Écoutez-moi ! Nous appartenons à la dynastie von Valancius ! Nous ne sommes plus de simples gardes de pacotille... nous sommes désormais le rempart {mf|du Libre-marchand|de la Libre-marchande} ! »
languages.original_text: "Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"

traits.locale_text: « Écoutez-moi ! Nous appartenons à la dynastie von Valancius ! Nous ne sommes plus de simples gardes de pacotille... nous sommes désormais le rempart [mf|du Libre-marchand|de la Libre-marchande} ! »

languages.text: «¡Escúchenme! ¡Somos parte de la dinastía von Valancius! Ya no somos Guardias Imperiales sin nombre: ¡somos el escudo de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente!».
languages.original_text: "Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Escúchenme! ¡Somos parte de la dinastía von Valancius! Ya no somos Guardias Imperiales sin nombre: ¡somos el escudo de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente!».

languages.text: "Hört mich an! Wir sind Teil der von Valancius-Dynastie! Wir sind keine namenlosen Soldaten mehr ... wir sind jetzt der Schild {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}!"
languages.original_text: "Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"

traits.locale_text: "Hört mich an! Wir sind Teil der von Valancius-Dynastie! Wir sind keine namenlosen Soldaten mehr ... wir sind jetzt der Schild {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}!"

languages.text: 「聞いてくれ！我々はフォン・ヴァランシウス家の血を引く者だ！我々はもはや名も無き衛兵ではなく、今はローグ・トレーダーの盾である！」
languages.original_text: "Hear me! We are part of the von Valancius dynasty! No longer are we nameless Guardsmen — we are the shield of the Rogue Trader now!"

traits.locale_text: 「聞いてくれ！我々はフォン・ヴァランシウス家の血を引く者だ！我々はもはや名も無き衛兵ではなく、今はローグ・トレーダーの盾である！」
